description: Minimal IPC allowlist (least privilege — see docs/security/tauri-ipc-boundary.md). The app's own #[tauri::command]s are allowed by default and need no entry, so the frontend's only gated needs are: the event system (it listens for the `auth_ready` and `plc_alert` events the backend emits) and the in-app OAuth `plugin:auth-session|start` command. Deliberately does NOT grant `core:default` — the blanket set bundles window/menu/tray/path/etc. this frontend never touches.
